requirement_topic.en: EPAC Classification — Pedelec ≤250 W / ≤25 km/h Safety (EN 15194:2017)

summary.en: In the EU, cycles with pedal assistance only, continuous rated motor power not exceeding 250 W, and assistance cut-off at 25 km/h (or when the rider stops pedalling) fall outside Regulation (EU) 168/2013 type-approval under the EPAC exemption. The mandatory legal obligation for the complete EPAC is CE conformity under the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC (and applicable successor rules), while EN 15194:2017 is a voluntary harmonised standard that may confer a presumption of conformity with relevant essential health and safety requirements. EN 15194 covers the complete cycle including battery, motor, charger, and control system.
summary.zh: 在欧盟，仅提供踏板助力、持续额定电机功率不超过250W、并在25km/h（或骑行者停止踩踏时）自动断开助力的车辆，依据EPAC豁免不纳入法规(EU) 168/2013型式认证范围。整车EPAC的强制性法律义务是依据机械指令2006/42/EC（及适用后继规则）完成CE合格评定；EN 15194:2017为自愿采用的协调标准，正确适用时可对相关基本健康与安全要求赋予合规推定。EN 15194覆盖整车，包括电池、电机、充电器及控制系统。
summary.zht: 在歐盟，僅提供踏板助力、持續額定電機功率不超過250W、並在25km/h（或騎行者停止踩踏時）自動斷開助力的車輛，依據EPAC豁免不納入法規(EU) 168/2013型式認證範圍。整車EPAC的強制性法律義務是依據機械指令2006/42/EC（及適用後繼規則）完成CE合格評定；EN 15194:2017為自願採用的協調標準，正確適用時可對相關基本健康與安全要求賦予合規推定。EN 15194覆蓋整車，包括電池、電機、充電器及控制系統。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles
Directive 2006/42/EC — Machinery Directive (as applicable to EPACs classified as bicycles)
Regulation (EU) 168/2013 — approval and market surveillance of two- or three-wheel vehicles (applies above EPAC limits)

gap.en: The key classification gap is motor power and assistance mode: CN GB 17761-2018 permits up to 400 W, while the EU EPAC exemption is limited to 250 W continuous rated output and pedal assistance. A CN e-bike with a motor rated 251–400 W, throttle-only operation, or assist above 25 km/h does not qualify for the EPAC exemption. It then requires L-category type approval under Regulation (EU) 168/2013, classified case-by-case: L1e-A only where the powered-cycle speed/power criteria are met, otherwise L1e-B or another L-category may apply. Exporters must confirm motor nameplate rated power is ≤250 W, assist cuts off at 25 km/h, and assistance is pedal-linked before claiming EPAC status.
gap.zh: 主要分类差距在于电机功率和助力方式：中国GB 17761-2018允许最高400W，而欧盟EPAC豁免限于持续额定输出功率250W且仅踏板助力。电机额定功率在251-400W之间、存在纯油门运行或助力超过25km/h的中国电动自行车不符合EPAC豁免。此类车辆须依据法规(EU) 168/2013进行L类车辆型式认证，并按具体情况分类：只有满足动力踏板车速度/功率条件时才属于L1e-A，否则可能属于L1e-B或其他L类。出口商须确认电机铭牌额定功率≤250W、助力在25km/h断开且助力与踩踏关联，方可主张EPAC身份。
gap.zht: 主要分類差距在於電機功率和助力方式：中國GB 17761-2018允許最高400W，而歐盟EPAC豁免限於持續額定輸出功率250W且僅踏板助力。電機額定功率在251-400W之間、存在純油門運行或助力超過25km/h的中國電動自行車不符合EPAC豁免。此類車輛須依據法規(EU) 168/2013進行L類車輛型式認證，並按具體情況分類：只有滿足動力踏板車速度/功率條件時才屬於L1e-A，否則可能屬於L1e-B或其他L類。出口商須確認電機銘牌額定功率≤250W、助力在25km/h斷開且助力與踩踏關聯，方可主張EPAC身份。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC for EPAC/pedelec ≤250W/25km/h; EN 15194:2017 is a voluntary harmonised standard that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 under SAMR for all electric bicycles sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a major classification gap: a CN e-bike may comply with GB 17761 at up to 400 W but still fall outside the EU EPAC exemption above 250 W or with throttle-only/high-speed assist. EU EPAC status should be supported by rated-power, cut-off, and pedal-assist evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是重大的分类差距：中国电动自行车即使在最高400W范围内符合GB 17761，若超过欧盟250W上限或具有纯油门/高速助力，仍可能超出欧盟EPAC豁免。欧盟EPAC身份应以额定功率、断电限速及踏板助力证据支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是重大的分類差距：中國電動自行車即使在最高400W範圍內符合GB 17761，若超過歐盟250W上限或具有純油門/高速助力，仍可能超出歐盟EPAC豁免。歐盟EPAC身份應以額定功率、斷電限速及踏板助力證據支持。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: China's primary e-bike safety standard is GB 17761-2018 (Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles), which mandates: motor ≤400 W, maximum speed ≤25 km/h, vehicle mass (including battery) ≤55 kg, must have pedals. GB 17761 is a mandatory GB standard administered by SAMR. The speed and pedal-assist limits are similar to EU pedelec limits, but the power limit (400 W vs EU 250 W) and mass limit (55 kg — no equivalent in EN 15194) differ. CN e-bikes may therefore have motors up to 400 W that would fall outside the EU EPAC classification.
summary.zh: 中国电动自行车主要安全标准为GB 17761-2018（电动自行车安全技术规范），强制要求：电机功率≤400W，最高车速≤25km/h，整车质量（含电池）≤55kg，须具备脚踏骑行功能。GB 17761为市场监管总局管理的强制性国标。限速及助力限制与欧盟Pedelec相近，但功率限制（400W对比欧盟250W）和整车质量限制（55kg，EN 15194无对应要求）存在差异。因此，功率在251-400W之间的中国电动自行车将超出欧盟EPAC分类范围。
summary.zht: 中國電動自行車主要安全標準為GB 17761-2018（電動自行車安全技術規範），強制要求：電機功率≤400W，最高車速≤25km/h，整車質量（含電池）≤55kg，須具備腳踏騎行功能。GB 17761為市場監管總局管理的強制性國標。限速及助力限制與歐盟Pedelec相近，但功率限制（400W對比歐盟250W）和整車質量限制（55kg，EN 15194無對應要求）存在差異。因此，功率在251-400W之間的中國電動自行車將超出歐盟EPAC分類範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)

summary.en: The mandatory obligation for an EPAC's structural, mechanical, electrical and functional safety is conformity with the Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC before CE marking the complete vehicle. EN 15194:2017 is a voluntary harmonised standard that may confer a presumption of conformity; it incorporates general cycle safety requirements such as EN ISO 4210 by reference and adds EPAC-specific electrical and functional safety requirements. Its mechanical requirements cover frame fatigue, fork tests, braking performance with electric drive engaged, handlebar strength, and lighting, while electrical subsystems include the motor drive, battery, charger, and wiring.
summary.zh: EPAC结构、机械、电气及功能安全的强制性义务，是整车粘贴CE标志前须符合机械指令2006/42/EC。EN 15194:2017属于自愿采用的协调标准，可赋予合规推定；该标准通过引用纳入EN ISO 4210等通用自行车安全要求，并增加EPAC特有的电气及功能安全要求。其机械要求涵盖车架疲劳、前叉、在电驱动工作状态下的制动性能、车把强度及照明；电气子系统包括电机驱动、电池、充电器及线束。
summary.zht: EPAC結構、機械、電氣及功能安全的強制性義務，是整車貼附CE標誌前須符合機械指令2006/42/EC。EN 15194:2017屬於自願採用的協調標準，可賦予合規推定；該標準通過引用納入EN ISO 4210等通用自行車安全要求，並增加EPAC特有的電氣及功能安全要求。其機械要求涵蓋車架疲勞、前叉、在電驅動工作狀態下的制動性能、車把強度及照明；電氣子系統包括電機驅動、電池、充電器及線束。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles
EN ISO 4210-2:2023 — Cycles — Safety requirements for bicycles — Part 2: Requirements for city and trekking, young adult, mountain and racing bicycles (incorporated by reference)

gap.en: Chinese GB 17761-2018 test reports do not by themselves demonstrate conformity with the EU Machinery Directive. Applying EN 15194:2017, including incorporated EN ISO 4210 tests, is a voluntary route to presumption of conformity and is commonly used for the Technical File. Specific gaps include: (a) braking performance evidence with electric assist engaged under the EN 15194 protocol; (b) EN ISO 4210 fatigue test methods differ from GB counterparts; (c) lighting requirements under EN 15194 reference EN 13194, which differs from China's GB 17761 lighting clause. The manufacturer or EU-authorised representative must compile a Technical File and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity.
gap.zh: 中国GB 17761-2018测试报告本身不能证明符合欧盟机械指令。采用EN 15194:2017（包括其引用的EN ISO 4210测试）是取得合规推定的自愿路径，并常用于技术文件。主要差距包括：（a）须按EN 15194规程提供电动助力系统工作状态下的制动性能证据；（b）EN ISO 4210疲劳测试方法与中国对应标准不同；（c）EN 15194照明要求参照EN 13194，与中国GB 17761照明条款存在差异。制造商或欧盟授权代表须编制技术文件并签发欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 中國GB 17761-2018測試報告本身不能證明符合歐盟機械指令。採用EN 15194:2017（包括其引用的EN ISO 4210測試）是取得合規推定的自願路徑，並常用於技術文件。主要差距包括：（a）須按EN 15194規程提供電動助力系統工作狀態下的制動性能證據；（b）EN ISO 4210疲勞測試方法與中國對應標準不同；（c）EN 15194照明要求參照EN 13194，與中國GB 17761照明條款存在差異。製造商或歐盟授權代表須編制技術文件並簽發歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC conformity and CE marking for EPACs; EN 15194:2017 is a voluntary harmonised standard that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 mechanical requirements under SAMR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is a compliance gap because a GB 17761 test report alone does not demonstrate EU Machinery Directive conformity for structural, mechanical, electrical, and functional safety. The Technical File should include EU-relevant evidence, often using EN 15194 and referenced EN ISO 4210 testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这里存在合规差距，因为仅有GB 17761测试报告不能证明结构、机械、电气及功能安全符合欧盟机械指令。技术文件应包含面向欧盟的证据，通常会采用EN 15194及其引用的EN ISO 4210测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這裡存在合規差距，因為僅有GB 17761測試報告不能證明結構、機械、電氣及功能安全符合歐盟機械指令。技術文件應包含面向歐盟的證據，通常會採用EN 15194及其引用的EN ISO 4210測試。

source.publisher: European Commission — Harmonised standards / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 covers similar mechanical safety areas (frame, brakes, lighting) but uses different test methods and limits. Chinese e-bike braking distance requirements differ from EN 15194 test conditions. CN vehicles are also tested to GB/T 15623 (cycle test methods). A Chinese type-approval test report from a CNCA-designated lab under GB 17761 is not transferable to EU CE conformity assessment under EN 15194.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018涵盖类似的机械安全领域（车架、制动、照明），但采用不同的测试方法和限值。中国电动自行车制动距离要求与EN 15194的测试条件不同。中国车辆还依据GB/T 15623（自行车测试方法）进行测试。CNCA指定实验室依据GB 17761出具的中国型式认证测试报告，不可转用于EN 15194下的欧盟CE合格评定。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018涵蓋類似的機械安全領域（車架、制動、照明），但採用不同的測試方法和限值。中國電動自行車制動距離要求與EN 15194的測試條件不同。中國車輛還依據GB/T 15623（自行車測試方法）進行測試。CNCA指定實驗室依據GB 17761出具的中國型式認證測試報告，不可轉用於EN 15194下的歐盟CE合格評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
